content.json:
## Ingestion and connector health
---
What is actually feeding this workspace, what it costs, and whether agents have gone quiet.

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize BillableGB = round(sum(Quantity) / 1024, 2) by DataType
| order by BillableGB desc
content.title: Billable ingestion by table (GB)

content.query:
Usage
| summarize IngestedGB = round(sum(Quantity) / 1024, 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), IsBillable
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Ingestion volume over time (GB)

content.query:
Usage
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by DataType
| where LastSeen < ago(24h)
| order by LastSeen asc
content.title: Tables that stopped ingesting (last seen > 24h ago)

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| where LastHeartbeat < ago(30m)
| order by LastHeartbeat asc
content.title: Agents gone quiet (no heartbeat in 30m)
